Configuration for code style settings, including indentation, line endings, and character encoding.

# Purpose
The `.editorconfig` file defines coding style guidelines for the project to ensure consistency across different editors and IDEs. It specifies that the root configuration is true, meaning this is the top-level configuration file. For all files, it sets the indentation style to spaces with an indent size of 4, enforces a final newline, trims trailing whitespace, uses LF for line endings, sets the character set to UTF-8, and limits the maximum line length to 88 characters. For files with extensions `yml`, `yaml`, `json`, `js`, `css`, and `html`, it overrides the indent size to 2 spaces.
